description: This file provides authentication utilities for a FastAPI backend, including password hashing, JWT token creation and decoding, and user authentication/authorization dependencies.

methods.name: str _get_jwt_secret()
methods.description: Retrieves the JWT secret from environment variable, raises error if missing.

methods.name: str _get_jwt_issuer()
methods.description: Returns the JWT issuer string, defaulting to 'recipe-hub-backend'.

methods.name: int _get_access_token_exp_minutes()
methods.description: Retrieves token expiration minutes, defaulting to 60 if environment variable is invalid.

methods.name: str hash_password(password: str)
methods.description: Hashes a plaintext password using bcrypt.

methods.name: bool verify_password(password: str, password_hash: str)
methods.description: Verifies a plaintext password against a hashed password.

methods.name: str create_access_token(*, subject: str, user_id: int, is_admin: bool)
methods.description: Creates a JWT access token with user info and claims.

methods.name: dict _decode_token(token: str)
methods.description: Decodes and validates a JWT token, raises HTTP 401 if invalid.

methods.name: User get_current_user( credentials: Optional[HTTPAuthorizationCredentials] = Depends(bearer_scheme), db: Session = Depends(get_db), )
methods.description: Retrieves the currently authenticated user based on Bearer token, raises HTTP 401 if invalid or missing.

methods.name: User require_admin(user: User = Depends(get_current_user))
methods.description: Dependency that enforces current user has admin privileges.

ctags.name: create_access_token
ctags.pattern: /^def create_access_token(*, subject: str, user_id: int, is_admin: bool) -> str:$/
ctags.signature: (*, subject: str, user_id: int, is_admin: bool)

ctags.name: get_current_user
ctags.signature: ( credentials: Optional[HTTPAuthorizationCredentials] = Depends(bearer_scheme), db: Session = Depends(get_db), )
